title: The Stimulus, Beyond The Grave
content:
The stimulus, beyond the grave
    His countenance to see,
    Supports me like imperial drams
    Afforded royally.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Stimulus, Beyond The Grave"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
